clearFail: Clear failed, check the console log
maxDocumentHierarchyLevelDesc: Maximum level of subdocuments to concatenate, max is {maxDocumentHierarchyLevel}.
maximumNumberOfDocumentsDesc: Limit the maximum number of concatenated subdocuments, max is {maximumNumberOfDocuments}
maximumNumberOfDocumentsReached: Exceeded max count {maximumNumberOfDocuments}, only the first {maximumNumberOfDocuments} are shown.
floatingEditButtonTopDistanceDesc: Distance from the top of the screen to show the floating edit button, in pixels. min is {minDistance}px, max is {maxDistance}px.
floatingEditButtonBottomDistanceDesc: Distance from the bottom of the screen to show the floating edit button, in pixels. min is {minDistance}px, max is {maxDistance}px.
floatingEditButtonOnLeftSideOfDocumentTi: Floating Edit Button On Left Side Of Document
floatingEditButtonOnLeftSideOfDocumentDe: Show the floating edit button on the left side of the document, default is off.
showSubDocTitleDesc: Show subdocument title in the concatenated document, default is on.
restoreOnStartupDesc: Restore the document's concatenation status when the application starts.
